html:query.declare: <DATOS oi_variable="" report="" modo="HTML" c_tipo_variable="" variable="" concepto="" activo=""/>

qry:select.name: qry_variables
qry_conceptos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select c.c_concepto, c.d_concepto, c.e_secuencia, l.c_tipo_parametro, c.l_activo , l.oi_variable from liq14_conc_var as l, liq14_conceptos as c JOIN l.oi_concepto INNER c.oi_concepto where {%? (#TEMP:@activo!='') {% c.l_activo = {#TEMP:@activo} %} {% 1 = 1 %} %} and l.oi_variable = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_variable %} group by l.oi_variable, c.c_concepto, c.d_concepto, c.e_secuencia, l.c_tipo_parametro, c.l_activo order by e_secuencia ASC, c_concepto ASC')/ROWS/ROW
